title: Phaedo Authorization Check Response
description: The result of phaedo_check_authorization — a deterministic-only pre-flight that reports whether a standing authorization (§10.5 force rule) already decides an action. Skips inferred evaluation. Carries ONLY the rule's decision + provenance, never fingerprint or layer content (§10.4).

authorization_matched.description: true when a standing authorization fired for this action.

signal.description: The authorized decision when matched (force effects resolve to escalate | decline | proceed); null when no authorization matches. A matched authorization is a deterministic pre-decision: confidence 1.0, deference high.

rule_id.description: The id of the authorization that fired, or null.

rationale_hint.description: Provenance when matched ("Per your standing rule: …"), or guidance to fall back to phaedo_consult when not.
